response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content: 00:00-02:11 is intro talk by Hakui Koyori. 02:12-04:58 is a song performance by Hakui Koyori and Nekomata Okayu. 2. Identified song title 'エアーマンが倒せない' from on-screen text at 02:12. 3. Identified original artist as 'Sera' (Team Nekokan). 4. Searched for 'エアーマンが倒せない 歌詞' and found the full lyrics. 5. Translated lyrics for the English version field. 6. Constructed the JSON object according to the schema.
response.global_summary: The video features VTubers Hakui Koyori and Nekomata Okayu singing a cover of the song 'Airman ga Taosenai' (I Can't Defeat Airman).

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori performs an introductory talk on stage before her song begins.
Hakui Koyori and Nekomata Okayu perform a live cover of 'Airman ga Taosenai' while dancing on stage. On-screen text indicates lyrics/composition by Sera.
scenes.song_title: エアーマンが倒せない
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
気がついたら同じ面ばかりプレイ
そしていつも同じ場所で死ぬ
あきらめずに消える足場に挑戦するけど
すぐに下に落ちるよ
アイテム2号があれば
楽に 向こうの岸までつくけど
何回やっても
何回やっても
エアーマンが倒せないよ
あの竜巻 何回やっても避けれない
後ろに回って 撃ち続けても
いずれは風に飛ばされる
タイム連打も ためしてみたけど
竜巻相手じゃ 意味がない!
だから次は絶対勝つために
僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく

気がついたら ライフももう少ししかない
そしていつも そこでE缶つかう
あきらめずに エアーマンまでたどり着くけれど
すぐに残機なくなる...
リーフシールドがあれば
楽に エアーマンを倒せるけど
何回やっても
何回やっても
ウッドマンが倒せないよ
落ちる木の葉は 何回やっても避けれない
後に下がって 距離をとっても
いずれは距離をつめられる
タイム連打も ためしてみたけど
あいつのジャンプはくぐれない
だから次は絶対勝つために
僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく
アイテム2号があれば
楽に 向こうの岸まで着くけど
何回やっても
何回やっても
エアーマンが倒せないよ
あの竜巻 何回やっても避けれない
後ろに回って 撃ち続けても
いずれは風に飛ばされる
タイム連打も ためしてみたけど
竜巻相手じゃ 意味が無い!
だから次は絶対勝つために
僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく
倒せないよ...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I noticed I'm playing the same level over and over
And I always die in the same spot
I don't give up, I challenge the vanishing platforms
But I fall down immediately
If I have Item 2, I can easily reach the other side
But no matter how many times I try
No matter how many times I try
I can't defeat Airman
That tornado, no matter how many times I try, I can't dodge it
Even if I go behind him and keep shooting
Eventually, I'll be blown away by the wind
I tried button-mashing too, but
Against the tornado, it's meaningless!
So next time, to definitely win
I'll keep the E-Tank until the very end

When I notice, my life is almost gone
And I always use the E-Tank right there
I don't give up, I reach Airman
But I immediately run out of extra lives
If I have the Leaf Shield, I can easily defeat Airman
But no matter how many times I try
No matter how many times I try
I can't defeat Woodman
Falling leaves, no matter how many times I try, I can't dodge them
Even if I step back and keep my distance
Eventually, I'll be closed in on
I tried button-mashing too, but
I can't dodge his jump
So next time, to definitely win
I'll keep the E-Tank until the very end
If I have Item 2, I can easily reach the other side
But no matter how many times I try
No matter how many times I try
I can't defeat Airman
That tornado, no matter how many times I try, I can't dodge it
Even if I go behind him and keep shooting
Eventually, I'll be blown away by the wind
I tried button-mashing too, but
Against the tornado, it's meaningless!
So next time, to definitely win
I'll keep the E-Tank until the very end
I can't defeat him...
